parameters.html:
=Hey {{ $json.Firstname }}

Thank you for your interest in joining the white list. To complete your registration, please verify your email address by using the code provided below:

Your Verification Code: {{ $json.code }}

Please enter this code on the verification page to secure your spot on our waitlist.

If you didn’t request this email or believe it was sent to you by mistake, please ignore it.

For any questions or assistance, feel free to contact us.

Best regards,
[your name]

Note: This is an automated message. Please do not reply directly to this email.

nodes.name: Waitlist Form

parameters.formDescription:
Thank you for the interest in our Service!
Join our waitlist to be one of the first users getting access to our service!

nodes.notes: This formTrigger node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.name: Note3

parameters.content:
## Instructions

This automation streamlines the process of **collecting user information** using a Form Node, enabling individuals to join a **waitlist managed via Google Sheets.**

It also **generates a verification code**, prompting users to input this code in the Second Form Step. If the code is _nvalid, the workflow keeps the user in a verification loop until a valid code is entered.

Once a **valid code is provided**, the workflow proceeds to the final step, where **additional information** can be collected.

All e**ntered data and intermediate states** are securely **stored in the Google Sheet**.

### Structure of the GoogleSheet

Firstname | Lastname | Email | Company | Verification-Code | Verified | Intended Use
Marcel | Claus-Ahrens | foo[at]bar| foobar | abc123 | TRUE | Just testing

### Setup

1. Set Up a Google Sheet: Create a Google Sheet with the specified columns, or customize them to suit your needs.
2. Verify the "Send Mail" Node: Ensure your "Send Mail" node is functional, or replace it with another email-sending node.
3. Customize Texts and Fields: Update email content, form texts, and form fields to align with your specific use case.
4. Done!

![Image]({{ $env.WEBHOOK_URL }}  
Enjoy the workflow! ❤️  
[let the workf low]({{ $env.WEBHOOK_URL }} — Workflow Automation & Development

parameters.formDescription:
Thank you for the interest in our Service!
Join our waitlist to be one of the first users getting access to our service!

prerequisites: An active n8n instance installed locally, in a Docker container, or hosted on n8n Cloud.
Basic familiarity with importing JSON templates in n8n.
setupInstructions: Download the JSON configuration for this workflow.
Ensure you set up credentials for all connected integrations.
Test your trigger and run execution.
requiredCredentials: google Sheets  O Auth2  A P I details
configurationSteps: Verify the settings of the trigger node "Waitlist Form".
Open the "Add  to Waitlist Sheet" Google Sheets node.
Ensure you select the spreadsheet file and specific tab/sheet from the dropdown menus.
Map the input JSON keys to your target sheet columns.
Open the "Send Verification Email" node (n8n-nodes-base.emailSend) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Validate with Verification Code" node (n8n-nodes-base.form) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note1" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Additional Data for the Sheet" node (n8n-nodes-base.form) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "is the Code correct?" node (n8n-nodes-base.if) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Let the User Reenter Code" node (n8n-nodes-base.form) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Merge" node (n8n-nodes-base.merge) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note2" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Save Intend to List" Google Sheets node.
Ensure you select the spreadsheet file and specific tab/sheet from the dropdown menus.
Map the input JSON keys to your target sheet columns.
Open the "Save as Verified" Google Sheets node.
Ensure you select the spreadsheet file and specific tab/sheet from the dropdown menus.
Map the input JSON keys to your target sheet columns.
Open the "Sticky Note3" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Generate Random Verification Code" node (n8n-nodes-base.crypto) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Note3" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Locate the Set/Edit fields node "Clean and Standardize".
Define or edit values for variables that are referenced in downstream nodes.
Locate the Set/Edit fields node "Get all Data from the Prev Form + Current".
Define or edit values for variables that are referenced in downstream nodes.
Locate the Set/Edit fields node "Every Step Data".
Define or edit values for variables that are referenced in downstream nodes.
testingSteps: Click the "Test step" or "Listen for test event" button on your Trigger node.
Send a test trigger from your source service (e.g. fill a test form or trigger a webhook trigger).
Verify that the node canvas lights up green, indicating successful data flow.
Open the final destination node to confirm that output records were saved correctly.
instructions.expectedResult: Upon trigger activation, inputs will flow through the configured nodes and execute actions successfully.
troubleshooting: Check credential warning symbols. Most workflow issues stem from expired OAuth connections or missing API permissions.
Verify that the data keys coming from your Trigger node match the exact names mapped in subsequent nodes (e.g., {{ $json.body.email }}).
Open the Execution history tab in n8n to view logs and determine which node failed.
securityNotes: Never hardcode API keys, passwords, or authentication bearer tokens in the plain text fields of node parameters.
If you download or share this workflow JSON, sanitize any sensitive parameters or configuration nodes.
customizationIdeas: Add an email node at the end to notify you of successful executions.
Incorporate an AI LLM node to summarize trigger payloads before writing them to integrations.
